channel.title: Posts on SharePick Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on SharePick Blog

item.title: 10 Productivity Tips for Developers
item.description:
10 Productivity Tips for Developers

As a developer, staying productive is crucial for meeting deadlines and maintaining a healthy work-life balance. Here are ten practical tips to help you boost your productivity:

1. Use Keyboard Shortcuts

Mastering keyboard shortcuts for your IDE and operating system can save you hours of time. Learn the most common shortcuts for tasks you perform frequently.

2. Take Regular Breaks

The Pomodoro Technique is a great way to stay focused: work for 25 minutes, then take a 5-minute break. After four cycles, take a longer break.

item.title: Student Fountain Pen & Carbon Gel Pen
item.description:
Fountain Pen

• Smooth and stable writing, no ink blots or skips

• Ergonomic grip for comfortable long-time use

• Durable nib, suitable for daily practice and homework

• Refillable ink design, economical and eco-friendly

• Simple and classic appearance, suitable for students

Carbon Gel Pen

• Extra-smooth 0.5mm fine point for clear writing

• Quick-dry ink to prevent smudging

• Strong ink concentration, ideal for exams and official writing

item.title: 我的第一篇博客
item.description:
• New strikes: US President Donald Trump said most of Iran’s military installations have been “knocked out” and that new strikes today targeted Iranian leadership. Israel also struck a compound belonging to a group responsible for electing Iran’s next supreme leader, an Israeli source told CNN.

• Iran death toll: At least 780 people have been killed by US and Israeli bombing across Iran, the semi-official Tasnim news agency reported, citing the Iranian Red Crescent.
